description:
Generate python-deps.toml in the expected format:
```toml
# Auto-generated by pydeps-gen
# Source: pyproject.toml / requirements.txt

[deps.package-name]
version = "1.2.3"
hash = "sha256-base64hash="
url = "https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/..."
```

- Sort packages alphabetically
- Include source file comment
- Optional: include original version constraint as comment
- Use explicit -o flag for output path
- Print progress to stderr (not stdout)
title: Generate python-deps.toml output
